title: lophochloa pumila
intro: Lophochloa pumila, also known as dwarf club rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lophochloa pumila include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lophochloa pumila may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health purposes.
